name: Save a product from the product detail page
scenarioId: saved_wishlist:Save a product from the product detail page
methodName: Save a product from the product detail page

testSteps.description: Given the shopper is on the homepage with products loaded

children.description: Shopper opens the browser at http://localhost:3001

testSteps.description: When the shopper clicks the first product card
Then the save button should be visible and functional on the detail page

userStory.narrative:
As an online shopper on Linea Supply
  I want to save products I am interested in
  So that I can find them easily later

title: Save a product from the product detail page
